description_long: This is a standard claw hammer with a robust, metallic head and a long, straight handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle appears to be covered in a textured, rubberized grip, providing comfort and slip resistance during use. The overall color scheme is predominantly black, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The hammer is well-proportioned, with the head securely attached to the handle, and no visible signs of wear or damage. There are no visible brand markings or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A black claw hammer with a metallic head and a textured, rubberized handle grip. The head features a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the flat striking face and the curved claw.
description_view_1: Angled view from the handle end, emphasizing the length and the oval opening of the claw.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, clearly displaying the handle's texture and the profile of the hammer head.
description_view_3: View from the head end, focusing on the claw's curvature and the striking face.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a black, rubberized ergonomic grip featuring a textured surface for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal, made of steel.
